title: cassia glandulosa subsp. patellaria
intro: Cassia glandulosa subsp. patellaria, also known as Cassia Patellaria, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cassia Patellaria include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing protection against oxidative stress. Cassia Patellaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
